author: Nintendo of America
text:
Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 - Event #7 5.16.2026
The Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 continues with Regular Season Week 5! Interested in participating? Join here: https://battlefy.com/nintendovs/splatoon3-north-american-league/
